title: The Anthem
why_this_song: The Anthem by Good Charlotte (2002) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "That I don't ever wanna be like you"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "This is the anthem"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "That I don't ever wanna be like you"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Do you really wanna be another trend?"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "That's what I'm told"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "anthem" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Do you wanna be part of that crowd?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Good Charlotte one question about "The Anthem", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Good Charlotte sobre "The Anthem", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "The Anthem" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "The Anthem" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "The Anthem" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "The Anthem" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
